title: 菊花賞の後に・青空は遠くとも

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I couldn't make it.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh well... I guess I had fun.

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Whooooaaa!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
I think I just fell in love with Seiun Sky! I had no
idea she was so amazing!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
She could cause a serious uproar in her senior
year!

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Skyyy! Show us more races like that in the
future!

The cheers, the applause, the roaring
excitement... Everyone had their eyes on Seiun
Sky, even more than on the actual winner.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I wonder what woulda happened if I'd won.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Haha! Guess that means next time I gotta—

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sei!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Great job out there! You were incredible!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you. You too, Spe.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I want to run with you again! Let's keep being
rivals next year!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Heh. That's a little presumptuous of ya, but sure.
Let's race again!

The two rivals show their mutual respect for
making it through the Classics. And as the
curtains close on the Kikuka Sho, the crowd
explodes with cheers at the sight of this beautiful
scene.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, Trainer... Guess I wasn't good enough for
the Kikuka Sho.
choice_data_list: But you worked hard for it.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You're right, I really did work hard. This just goes
to show I'm not a strong Umamusume.
choice_data_list: But you really wowed the audience.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Huh... I guess so. Maybe I was pretty fun to
watch?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh, and did you see the look on Spe's face?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
She still hasn't had her fill! She's gonna make me
work myself to the bone all over again.

Sky smiles bitterly as she says this, but at the
same time, she seems to be enjoying herself.

On our way home from the race, Sky is
surrounded by a large number of fans.

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's Seiun Sky! That was an amazing race
today!

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
I can't wait to see you in the Arima Kinen! Good
luck!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: The Arima Kinen? Am I running in that?

The year-end Grand Prix—the Arima Kinen...
Many set this race as a goal, but Seiun Sky hasn't
given it any thought yet.

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
Oh... I figured since you did so great today, well,
the next one would be a given...

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
With this momentum, you can beat Grass Wonder
and prove that you're the top of your generation!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Ohh, so Grass is gonna be there?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I see... The top of my generation, huh...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
That's a good enough reason for me. Guess I'm
running in the Arima Kinen then.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
It's not like I had anything else in mind. This works
out pretty great.
choice_data_list:
The other racers are the best of the bunch. Are
you sure you can handle that?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Wow, how can you say that? After we just went
for the Triple Crown together, no less! ♪

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Things'll work themselves out, just like they
always have.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
And I have a feeling something really cool is
gonna happen. ♪

As simply as that, Sky's fans have talked her into
her next goal... the Arima Kinen!
